data.title: Former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler: I have no regrets about strictly regulating the crypto industry during my tenure
data.description: In an interview with CNBC reporter Sara Eisen, former SEC Chairman Gary Gensler expressed no regrets about his strict regulation of the crypto industry during his tenure. He stated, "I'm very proud of our achievements. We have always worked hard to ensure investor rights." Regarding his successor, current SEC Chairman Paul Atkins, Gary Gensler seemed unimpressed, insisting that, aside from Bitcoin, most cryptocurrencies in the crypto industry are still being hyped, divorced from fundamentals, and highly speculative. (cryptoinamerica)

data.title: Grayscale Launches Grayscale Crypto 5 ETF - CoinDesk
data.description: According to official news, Grayscale announced the launch of the Grayscale CoinDesk Crypto 5 ETF, which aims to track the five most mature (largest and most liquid) cryptocurrencies: Bitcoin, Ethereum, SOL, XRP and ADA.

data.title: 2 newly created wallets withdrew 851 BTC from the exchange
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, two newly created wallets withdrew 851 BTC worth $99 million from exchanges, indicating that whales are still accumulating Bitcoin.

data.title: Bank of Canada: Stablecoins are gradually becoming mainstream, and a unified federal regulatory framework is needed
data.description: Ron Morrow, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Canada, stated that stablecoins have gradually become mainstream in cross-border payments and daily transactions, and Canada needs to establish a unified federal regulatory framework to avoid falling behind the United States, Britain and other countries in payment modernization. He pointed out that the current provincial regulatory fragmentation is serious and called for the acceleration of the formulation of regulations to ensure the security of the financial system. Currently, the cost of cross-border remittances in Canada is as high as 5-10%, but stablecoins can reduce it to less than 1%. (Decrypt)

data.title: Trader ZetaCentauri made $3.648 million in profit in one month, with six consecutive profitable trades
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684 xtpa), contract trader ZetaCentauri has seen six consecutive profitable trades over the past month, totaling $3.648 million. He trades exclusively in SOL, ETH, and WLFI, bringing his account's total profit to $7.306 million. His trading style is relatively aggressive, with current holdings exceeding $6 million in WLFI, and his other holdings in ETH and SOL exceeding $10 million, all of which are currently long.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches AOP
data.description: According to the official website, Binance Alpha has launched AOP. Contract address: 0xd5df4d260d7a0145f655bcbf3b398076f21016c7

data.title: Cardano's Potential Rally: Technical Indicators Point to $1.25 Target
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Cardano (ADA) is currently exhibiting several technical and on-chain signals that suggest a potential rally to $1.25 in the near future. The cryptocurrency's price is trading within a symmetrical triangle on the daily chart, with a crucial resistance level at $0.925. A successful breakout above this level could propel ADA to a target of $1.25, marking a 38% increase from its current price. The relative strength index has shown a steady increase from 40 to 55 since early August, indicating growing bullish momentum.

Cardano is also forming a cup-and-handle pattern on the four-hour chart, with a neckline resistance at $0.96. A breakout above this level could confirm a bullish trend, potentially driving the price to $1.20, which would represent a 32% gain. The cryptocurrency's open interest in futures markets has reached a record high of $1.95 billion, reflecting strong speculative interest. This surge in open interest suggests that traders are increasingly betting on ADA's upward movement, possibly fueled by speculation around a potential spot Cardano ETF. The open interest has increased by 22% over the past 12 days, indicating heightened demand for leveraged positions.

Historically, a rise in open interest has preceded significant price movements, as observed between June and mid-August when ADA's price nearly doubled following a 150% increase in open interest. The likelihood of a spot Cardano ETF approval has also risen significantly, with odds increasing to 90% from 59% earlier in August, according to Polymarket. These factors, combined with multiple technical and on-chain indicators, suggest a strong case for ADA's price rallying toward $2 or higher, provided it can decisively break the $1 psychological resistance level. This article does not offer investment advice, and readers are encouraged to conduct their own research before making any investment decisions.

data.title: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen: Restrictive measures will hit cryptocurrency platforms
data.description: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen stated that the EU will intensify its crackdown on sanctions evasion, and restrictive measures will hit cryptocurrency platforms. (Jinshi)

data.title: OKX urgently delists DUCKUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to an official announcement, after comprehensive evaluation by the OKX risk control and product teams, the platform will urgently delist the DUCKUSDT contract at 12:00 AM (UTC+8) on September 20, 2025. Considering the potential for significant market fluctuations before the contract's delisting, users are advised to implement risk management measures such as reducing leverage or closing positions early. If the contract price deviates before delisting, the platform will adjust the price limit rules as appropriate based on market conditions. While the contract is delisted, no funding will be charged for closing user positions, and no additional fees such as settlement fees will be incurred. The funding rate for this period will be 0 (and therefore, this funding fee will not appear in your account statements).

data.title: ProCap BTC files S-4 form with the US SEC seeking listing, disclosing BTC holdings with over $60 million in unrealized profits
data.description: Bitcoin treasury company ProCap BTC has filed a Form S-4 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, seeking to merge with Nasdaq-listed Columbus Circle Capital Corp I (BRR). The filing reveals that the company has unrealized gains of over $60 million on the 4,950 bitcoins it purchased in June of this year. (Prnewswire)

data.title: FG NEXUS increased its holdings by 1,087 ETH, bringing its total holdings to 49,715 ETH
data.description: Nasdaq-listed company FG NEXUS announced that it has increased its holdings of ETH by 1,087 at an average price of $4,598, bringing its total holdings to 49,715, with a total value of approximately $229 million. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Deputy Secretary for Justice of Hong Kong: The Basic Law guarantees the free flow of capital, and the Stablecoin Ordinance effectively controls risks
data.description: Dr. Cheung Kwok-kwan, Deputy Secretary for Justice of Hong Kong, addressed the China-ASEAN Commercial Law Forum. He stated, "Hong Kong's Basic Law guarantees the free flow of capital and funds, and all investment and commercial activities are subject to strict oversight and safeguards. We have also established a regulatory framework that upholds integrity and innovation to ensure the orderly and healthy development of emerging businesses. For example, the Stablecoin Ordinance, which was just passed in August this year, establishes a licensing system for the issuance of stablecoins. By improving the regulatory framework for virtual asset activities and effectively managing risks, we are promoting financial innovation." (Hong Kong Government Press Release)

data.title: Zhu Min, former deputy governor of the People's Bank of China: Data is becoming an asset, and building a data market requires blockchain infrastructure and other elements
data.description: Zhu Min, former Deputy Governor of the People's Bank of China, pointed out that the digital economy is driven by three fundamental forces: computing power, algorithms, and data. Data is the source and starting point. Enabling data to flow is about turning it into assets and capital, making it valuable and ultimately wealth. Data is becoming an asset, and building a data market requires elements such as transactions, platforms, evaluation, blockchain infrastructure, and oversight. (The Paper)

data.title: Former Fed official Bullard: A 25 basis point rate cut is almost as good as a 25 basis point rate cut in October for doves
data.description: Former Fed official James Bullard said that for doves, a 25 basis point rate cut this week is almost as good as a 25 basis point rate cut in October. If it were me, I would not vote for a 50 basis point rate cut this week. All the candidates listed as candidates for Fed chairman are "very good." (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate will launch 0G (0G) and simultaneously launch a series of 0G Ecosystem Week activities
data.description: According to an official announcement, Gate will launch spot trading for 0 G (0G) at 18:00 (UTC+8) on September 22nd, and has also opened futures trading. The platform will also launch a series of events, including a futures trading competition, Yubibao, and CandyDrop, offering a chance to share 1,066,667 0G. The 0G Futures Trading Competition will run from 16:00 on September 18th to 16:00 on September 25th (UTC+8). Users who complete their first futures trade, trade futures, or invite friends will receive a share of 30,000 USDT, with a maximum individual win of 210 USDT. Gate will also launch the 0G Yubibao event on September 22nd, 2025. Participants in Yubibao will be able to share 1,000,000 0G on a first-come, first-served basis. Gate CandyDrop's 89th event, CandyDrop x 0G, will run from 18:10 on September 22nd to 19:00 on September 30th (UTC+8). Users can complete simple trading tasks to win candy and share 66,667 0G, with a maximum individual share of 200 OG.

data.title: The Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants plans to launch virtual asset accounting and auditing guidelines in the first half of 2026.
data.description: The Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA) responded to Hong Kong Chief Executive John Lee's Policy Address, which outlined a variety of measures to boost economic development. The statement noted that innovative technology will become a new driver of growth for Hong Kong and the global economy. As the standard-setter for Hong Kong's accounting profession, the HKICPA is developing appropriate guidance on accounting and auditing for virtual assets and related matters, with an expected release in the first half of next year. Furthermore, it recommends implementing measures to complement the existing patent box mechanism, including the launch of an intellectual property financing sandbox and the promotion of intellectual property transactions, to encourage local innovation and technology activities and enhance Hong Kong's competitiveness in related fields. Further development of the digital asset market is also recommended. (Aastocks)

data.title: Defiance launches Ethereum ETF "ETHI" based on leverage and options strategies
data.description: Defiance, an exchange-traded fund issuer, announced the launch of an Ethereum ETF based on leverage and options strategies: the Defiance Leveraged Long + Income Ethereum ETF (ETHI). The ETF tracks the Ethereum ETP listed on the US market and seeks returns using a credit call spread strategy. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Data: Bitcoin's illiquid supply reaches a record high of 14.3 million
data.description: Glassnode data shows that the number of BTC held by entities that have not been sold for more than seven years has increased by 422,430 since January 1, pushing Bitcoin's "illiquid supply" to a record high of 14.3 million. Bitcoin's current circulating supply is approximately 19.92 million, which means that more than 72% of all mined BTC is classified as illiquid. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: BitMart launches Dill (DL)
data.description: According to an official announcement, BitMart will launch Dill (DL) on September 19th at 9:00 PM (ET), opening the DL/USDT trading pair. Dill represents a new blockchain paradigm characterized by decentralization and scalability.

data.title: Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission Executive Director Liang Zhongxian: CME's crypto futures contracts account for a high proportion of Asia-Pacific trading volume
data.description: At the 2025 Futures and Options World (FOW) Trading Asia conference, Liang Zhongxian, Executive Director of the Market Supervision Department of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission, stated that exchanges and financial institutions in the United States and Europe are leading innovations in multiple areas in incubating new derivatives, including digital assets, ESG-linked derivatives, etc. Despite this, the innovative potential of the Asian derivatives market is obvious to all. For example, the cryptocurrency futures contracts of the Chicago Mercantile Exchange have a high proportion of trading volume from the Asia-Pacific region.
